productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Max Black Green Black Shoe
description: CLASSIC TREAT ON THE RUN The nike Air Max+ 2001 is popular among acknowledged groups. Offering premium quality and comfort, myntra has jumped the line to bring to you the best of the best running shoes in town. Designed with maximum cushioning and seamless Fit, there's no better running shoe than the nike Air Max+ 2011. This range of shoes from Nike is one of the most preferred lot world over as it is not only lightweight (weighs only about 13.8 ounces), but also offers ample cushioning and protection, which is especially beneficial for runners who weigh about 20 pounds or more than normal. Maintaining its high standard in impact protection for more than 20 years now, the Nike Air range is probably the most durable, versatile and revolutionary range of shoes that has created a new meaning of encapsulating air for cushioning footstrike in athletic shoes. An improvisation of its popular predecessor, the Nike Air Max+ 2011 has a lightweight upper and a plusher fit and feel. It is replete with a stylishly designed meshed upper and inner sleeve to enhance ventilation for the feet and keep them safe from sweat and resultant diseases. After all, a dry and comfortable fit will help you concentrate on your instead of worrying about uneasily sweaty and heavy feet. Injury safeguards When running, the repetitive downward force of the feet during their contact with the ground can wreck havoc to the body and affect performance drastically. Nike has ensured that its running shoes are built to absorb shock and keep the feet safe from impact-related injuries. Hence, employed with Air Max technology, this pair of Air Max+ 2011 shoes is designed for the serious runner with maximum cushioning to absorb impact. It is engineered with a fully visible shock absorption unit to provide ample cushioning for the feet by creating an air bag that takes all the pounding helping you run fast and wide. The entire midsole is made of Cushlon technology to enhance springy resilience, ensuring you enjoy a smoother and more natural motion, with maximum impact protection. Run light, firm and healthy The upper of the Nike Air Max+ 2011 range of shoes is featured with Hyperfuse technology, wherein several materials are fused together for incredibly lightweight comfort and extra durability and breathability without any glue or stitching. The mesh inner sleeve, which is also called the bootie, wraps completely around the foot, adding to it a plush feel and enhancing ventilation at the same time.  These shoes also have moulded collars around the ankles to reduce slippage and increase grip and stability. The rubber outsole employs a waffle pattern and lugs around the perimeter for durability and traction. The flex grooves enhance flexibility of the feet and, coupled with the cushioned outsole, they ensure a smoother heel to toe transition. Performance trackers With the Nike+ range, it is extremely easy to track your time, distance, pace and the number of calories you've burned. Slip into your shoe a sensor, a Sports watch, an iPhone or an iPod and enjoy those long health runs in absolute style and comfort. The list of gifts from the Nike Air Max+ range doesn't just end here. These shoes are engineered with reflective material to ensure you are visible even in low light. They also have a coloured Air Max unit with a translucent perimeter on the outsole to differentiate them from other shoes and enhance your style quotient. Upper Hyperfuse designed upper employs heat and pressure fusion to create a bond that is sturdier, yet lighter than traditional stitching for lightweight durability and optimal breathability, as well as exceptional fit and feel Plush collar reduces slippage and provides a great step-in feel Reflective elements allow you to remain visible in low light Midsole Mesh innersleeve envelops the entire foot for added comfort Notched sides allow for easy removal and insertion of the feet Contoured EVA insole with Fitsole design for great step-in feel Full-length Cushlon midsole delivers resilient, springy cushioning Full-length, articulated MaxAir unit provides supreme cushioning and promotes a smoother, more natural range of motion through footstrike Outsole Solid rubber outsole in a waffle fill pattern offers traction on varied surfaces Strategically placed lugs around the perimeter for enhanced traction and long-lasting wear Forefoot flex grooves allow the foot to move more fluidly Wash care1. Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine wash
